description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old documents category, documents of the Seki family. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1976-03-17. Privately held (Omigawa).

name_en: Old Documents of the Tanimoto Family
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old documents category, old documents of the Tanimoto family. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1976-03-17. Privately held (Okaiida).

name_romaji: Moriyama Jōshu Tō Tanetada Fusai no Haka

description_en: A monument designated as a historic site, the graves of Tō Tanetada, lord of Moriyama Castle, and his wife. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1976-03-17. Located at Hōtaiji Temple (Okaiida).

description_en: A monument designated as a natural monument, the four-season cherry tree of Jurinji Temple. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1976-03-17. Located at Jurinji Temple (Gogōuchi).

An intangible folk cultural property, the Higenade (beard-stroking) festival of Sobataka Shrine. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1977-06-01. Held at Sobataka Shrine (Ōkura).

A monument designated as a historic site, the grave of Inō Akinori. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1977-06-01. Located at Kanpukuji Temple (Makino).

description_en: A monument designated as a historic site, a site associated with legends of Minamoto no Mitsunaka. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1977-06-01. Located at Kōmyōin Temple (Tada).

description_en: A monument designated as a historic site, a site associated with the Nabeshima clan of the Hizen Kashima domain. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1984-09-01. Located at Entsūji Temple (Kamiogawa).
